title: Erasmus+
content:
Erasmus+

Required Documents

Okan Homepage

International

International Exchange Programs

Erasmus Programme

Outgoing Students

Internship Mobility

Required Documents

MENU

Internship Approval Form

Learning Agreement for Traineeship

Evaluation Form

a) Documents to Be Submitted to the Erasmus Office Before Mobility

Application Form

Acceptance Letter      (An official document including the student's full name, internship dates,      stating that the internship is within the scope of Erasmus Traineeship      Mobility, and confirming approval from the host institution with its      official stamp and authorized signature.)

Copy of      Passport

Copy of ID      Card

Internship Approval      Form

Erasmus Student      Work Placement Form

Insurance Document      (Accident and Liability Insurance)

Halk Bank Euro      Account Information (Copy of Passbook or Receipt)

Transcript

English Language      Certificate (From the Foreign Languages Department)

Visa (If      applicable)

b) Documents to Be Submitted to the Erasmus Office After Mobility

Certificate of      Participation / Certificate of Attendance (An official document including      the student's full name, internship dates, stating that the internship was      within the scope of Erasmus Traineeship Mobility, and confirming      successful completion of the internship by the host institution with its      official stamp and authorized signature.)

Internship      Certificate & Evaluation Form

Learning Agreement      for Traineeship / After Mobility

Copy of Passport:

Including      pages with entry and exit stamps.

Participant      Report: Report obtained from the Mobility Tool / Beneficiary Module.
